onboard: Requires 2 working keys. Insert key 1 → ON 3–15 sec → OFF/remove. Within 15 sec insert key 2 → ON ~10 sec until immobilizer lamp flashes + chime → OFF/remove. Within 50 sec insert new key → ON ~10 sec → chime + lamp on 3 sec = programmed. Repeat from step 1 for each additional key.
addKey: Same as onboard sequence above (2 working keys required). Cut new Y159-PT blade first. Use locksmith OBD2 programmer if only 1 working key available.
allKeysLost: Professional OBD2 programmer required (Autel IM508/IM608, AutoProPad, Lonsdor K518). Connect to OBD2 port, enter 4-digit SKIM PIN, select 'Program Ignition Keys / SKIM', program new key. Cut Y159-PT blade before programming.
pinSource: OBD read (DMAX / Chrysler SKIM Reader via OBD2) | PIN by VIN (NASTF / aftermarket PIN services) | dealer
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, above brake pedal, left of steering column
securityWait: none (standard sequence); if PIN locked: wait 1 hour then retry

onboard: Requires 2 working fobik keys. Insert fobik 1 into WIN → ON 3–15 sec → OFF/remove. Within 15 sec insert fobik 2 → ON ~10 sec until chime + immobilizer lamp → OFF/remove. Within 50 sec insert new fobik → ON ~10 sec → chime + lamp = programmed. NOTE: some sources indicate 2010 models require professional programming only — verify year.
addKey: If 2 working fobiks available: use onboard sequence above. If only 1 working key: use OBD2 programmer (Autel IM508, AutoProPad, AlfaOBD + OBDLink MX) with 4-digit SKIM PIN.
allKeysLost: Professional OBD2 programmer required. Connect to OBD2 port, read SKIM PIN (via OBD or NASTF), select 'Program Ignition Keys', program IYZ-C01C fobik. Remote functions program automatically with transponder.
pinSource: OBD read (DMAX / Chrysler SKIM Reader) | PIN by VIN (NASTF) | dealer
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, above brake pedal, left of steering column
securityWait: none (standard sequence); if PIN locked: wait 1 hour then retry

addKey: Professional OBD2 programmer required. Connect to OBD2 port (standard location), enter 4-digit WIN/SKIM PIN, navigate to 'Program Key FOBs / Ignition Keys', program proximity smart key. AlfaOBD + OBDLink MX viable for locksmiths. 2018 requires SGW 12+8 bypass cable first.
allKeysLost: Professional OBD2 programmer required. Use Autel IM608 Pro, AutoProPad G2, or Lonsdor K518ISE. Read SKIM/WIN PIN via OBD2 or NASTF portal. Select 'All Keys Lost', program new M3N-40821302 smart keys. 2018: install 12+8 SGW bypass cable (SGW under left dash above OBD port) before connecting programmer.
pinSource: OBD read (Autel IM608, OBDSTAR F104) | NASTF Stellantis independent operator portal | dealer
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, above brake pedal, left of steering column
securityWait: none (standard); if 'Current PIN Locked': wait 1 hour with key in ON position, then retry
specialTool: FCA Secure Gateway (SGW) 12+8 bypass cable required on 2018 models (SGW located under left dash above OBD port). AutoAuth does NOT support key programming — bypass cable + LSID required.

addKey: SGW 12+8 bypass cable required (SGW under left dash above OBD port). Connect bypass cable to SGW module 12-pin and 8-pin connectors, then connect programmer to OBD2. Enter SKIM PIN. Navigate to Dodge → Charger → Smart Key → Add Key. Program M3M-40821302 Hitag AES key. AutoAuth does NOT support key programming.
allKeysLost: SGW 12+8 bypass cable required. Autel IM608 Pro (with AutoAuth subscription for diagnostics only, bypass cable for programming) or equivalent. Steps: connect bypass cable, connect OBD2 programmer, Read PIN (OBD read or NASTF portal), select All Keys Lost, program new M3M-40821302 keys. Hellcat/SRT: red key (full power) and black key (restricted) must both be programmed.
pinSource: OBD read via bypass cable (Autel IM608 Pro) | NASTF Stellantis independent operator portal | dealer
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, above brake pedal, left of steering column
securityWait: none (standard); if 'Current PIN Locked': wait 1 hour then retry
specialTool: FCA Secure Gateway (SGW) 12+8 bypass cable required (e.g. YOUCANIC, AUGOCOM, Autel TDB084). AutoAuth alone insufficient for key programming — physical bypass + LSID required.

Program all keys in one session (all previous keys erased).

onboard: Requires 2 working fobik keys (SKIM system). Procedure per Locksmith Ledger 2008-2009 Chrysler 300C article: connect OBD tool → IMMOBILIZER → CHRYSLER → '300C [CAN] 08-09' → NEW KEY ADDING → enter 4-digit immobilizer PIN → insert new fobik → ON → await 'Ding' confirmation. (OBD-assisted, not pure key-cycle; immobilizer code required.)
addKey: OBD2 programmer (Silca SDD, TKO, Autel IM508, AutoProPad) + 4-digit immobilizer PIN. Connect to OBD2 port. Select New Key Adding. Insert new IYZ-C01C fobik. Remote programs automatically during transponder programming.
allKeysLost: Professional OBD2 programmer required. Read 4-digit immobilizer/SKIM PIN via OBD2 (DMAX, Chrysler SKIM Reader) or NASTF. Select 'Erase All Keys' then 'Program Ignition Keys' to add new IYZ-C01C fobik. Fobik cannot be reprogrammed for a different vehicle after programming.

addKey: Two-stage professional process: (1) Pre-code new key — use Autel IM608, TM PRO, or Abrites AVDI to load vehicle security code onto new SIP22-PT transponder key (PCF7936/PCF7946). (2) Program via OBD — connect to OBD2 port, navigate to BCM (Delphi 93C66), enter PIN, select 'Learn Key', then 'Learn All Keys' (all existing keys must be present and reprogrammed together or they are permanently disabled). For flip key: program remote buttons separately after transponder step. Cut SIP22-PT blade before programming.
allKeysLost: Professional process. Use Abrites AVDI (FN022), Autel IM608 with XP400 Pro, or TM PRO. PIN source: read BCM Delphi 93C66 chip (93C66 EEPROM in some, OBD read in others per tool). Steps: pull PIN from BCM, pre-code new virgin transponder key to vehicle security code, then OBD learn-key procedure (all new keys must be learned in one session). After programming: remove all keys, disconnect OBD, wait 60 sec, start engine with first new key, test all keys. BCM locks permanently if broken into incorrectly — must follow exact procedure.
pinSource: OBD read (Autel IM608, Abrites AVDI FN022, TM PRO) | EEPROM read of Delphi BCM (93C66) | dealer VIN lookup
obdPort: Under dash, driver side
securityWait: 60 seconds after disconnect before testing; BCM can lock permanently if incorrect approach used on AKL
specialTool: Abrites AVDI (FN022) or Autel IM608 Pro + XP400 Pro or TM PRO required. Delphi BCM system — NOT standard FCA SKIM procedure.

addKey: Professional OBD2 programmer required (Autel IM608 Pro, AutoProPad G2, Lonsdor K518ISE, Abrites AVDI). Two key variants by trim — confirm before ordering: (A) Smart proximity (M3N-40821302, Hitag2/ID46, 433 MHz) — Trekking/Urbana: standard FCA WIN/SKIM OBD2 procedure + 4-digit PIN; (B) Flip key (2ADFTFI5AM433TX, Megamos AES/ID88, SIP22 blade, 434 MHz) — Pop/Easy/Sport: PIN required, OBD2 via Abrites AVDI or Autel. Both require professional tools.
allKeysLost: Professional process — tool and procedure differ by variant: (A) Smart key: OBD2 programmer + SKIM/WIN PIN (OBD read or NASTF); (B) Flip key with Megamos AES: Abrites AVDI (FN022) preferred; PIN from OBD read or EEPROM. For both: All Keys Lost mode, program all new keys in one session.
pinSource: OBD read (Autel IM608 Pro, Abrites AVDI FN022, Lonsdor K518ISE) | NASTF Stellantis portal (smart key variant) | dealer
obdPort: Under dash, driver side
securityWait: none (standard); wrong PIN 3 times may lock system
specialTool: Abrites AVDI (FN022) strongly recommended for flip-key (Megamos AES/ID88) variant. Smart-key variant: standard FCA programmer sufficient.
